jira_task.summary: UI Development: Implement New eCommerce Global Header and Footer From Scratch
jira_task.description:
Description
Develop and implement new, responsive global header and footer components from scratch to establish the primary layout structure for the eCommerce site. This task focuses on building these elements entirely anew to integrate personal branding, improve the navigation hierarchy, and update legacy informational content.
What to Change
Branding Update (Header): Incorporate the text "Raj chavda the developer" into the new header display, ensuring it is prominently positioned according to the design mockups.
Branding Update (Footer): Replace the existing "Add us on social media?" text (referencing image_89ccdf.png) with the updated brand identity "Raj chavda".
Header Navigation Setup: Build a clean, accessible navigation bar from scratch, mapping primary links (e.g., Shop, Categories, Search) for seamless user routing.
Footer Content Refresh: Set the copyright string to 2026 and standardize all informational and legal link labels (e.g., Help Center, Support, Terms of Service).
Acceptance Criteria
[ ] Both header and footer components are built from scratch and successfully integrated into the global application layout.
[ ] The text "Raj chavda the developer" is visible and correctly styled within the new header structure.
[ ] The "Raj chavda" brand name is correctly placed in the footer where the social media prompt was previously intended.
[ ] The footer copyright year is set to 2026.
[ ] All header and footer navigation links are active, accessible, and redirect to the correct functional pages.
[ ] Both components are fully responsive, maintaining design integrity and proper alignment across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.

knowledge_context.summary: Develop responsive global header and footer components with specific branding updates, navigation setup, and content refresh for an eCommerce site, adhering to provided acceptance criteria.

task_intent.intent_summary: The user wants to develop new global header and footer components with specific branding updates, navigation setup, and content refresh for an eCommerce site, adhering to provided acceptance criteria.

risks: Risks related to UI responsiveness, accessibility, and proper alignment across various devices can be mitigated by thorough testing and adherence to established design guidelines.
knowledge_context.codebase_notes: Developers should focus on implementing the branding updates, navigation setup, and content refresh as per the acceptance criteria. Ensure all components are fully responsive to maintain design integrity across different devices.
knowledge_context.backend_reason: No API routes, server logic, DB, or auth are required for this task. It is a pure UI development effort.

technical_spec.title: UI Development: Implement New eCommerce Global Header and Footer From Scratch
technical_spec.overview: Develop responsive global header and footer components with specific branding updates, navigation setup, and content refresh for an eCommerce site, adhering to provided acceptance criteria.
acceptance_criteria: [1] Both header and footer components are built from scratch and successfully integrated into the global application layout.
[2] The text 'Raj chavda the developer' is visible and correctly styled within the new header structure.
[3] The 'Raj chavda' brand name is correctly placed in the footer where the social media prompt was previously intended.
[4] The footer copyright year is set to 2026.
[5] All header and footer navigation links are active, accessible, and redirect to the correct functional pages.
[6] Both components are fully responsive, maintaining design integrity and proper alignment across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.
technical_spec.rollout_notes: Ensure all components are fully responsive and maintain design integrity across different viewport sizes. Verify that the text 'Raj chavda the developer' is visible and correctly styled within the new header structure, and that the 'Raj chavda' brand name is correctly placed in the footer where the social media prompt was previously intended. Confirm that the footer copyright year is set to 2026 and all navigation links are active, accessible, and redirect to the correct functional pages. Validate that both components are fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.

test_cases.title: Verify header component is built from scratch and visible in layout
preconditions: Header component exists and backend integration is not needed
steps: Open the eCommerce site.
Navigate to a page that displays the global header.
Verify that the 'Raj chavda the developer' text is present in the header.
test_cases.expected: The 'Raj chavda the developer' text is visible and correctly styled within the new header structure.

test_cases.title: Verify footer component is built from scratch and visible in layout
preconditions: Footer component exists and backend integration is not needed
steps: Open the eCommerce site.
Navigate to a page that displays the global footer.
Verify that the 'Raj chavda' brand name is present in the footer.
test_cases.expected: The 'Raj chavda' brand name is correctly placed in the footer where the social media prompt was previously intended.

test_cases.title: Verify header and footer navigation links are active and accessible
steps: Open the eCommerce site.
Navigate to a page that displays both the global header and footer.
Click on each navigation link (Shop, Categories, Search) in the header and ensure it redirects to the correct functional pages.
test_cases.expected: All header and footer navigation links are active, accessible, and redirect to the correct functional pages.

test_cases.title: Verify responsive design of both components across different viewports
steps: Open the eCommerce site on a mobile device.
Navigate to a page that displays both the global header and footer.
Verify that both components are responsive and maintain design integrity across different viewports.
test_cases.expected: Both components are fully responsive, maintaining design integrity and proper alignment across mobile, tablet, and desktop viewports.

test_cases.title: Verify footer copyright year is set to 2026
steps: Open the eCommerce site.
Navigate to a page that displays the global footer.
Verify that the copyright year is set to 2026.
test_cases.expected: The footer copyright string is set to 'Copyright © 2026 Raj chavda. All rights reserved.'

jira_task.summary: UI Content Update In Footer Section
jira_task.description:
Update the text in the footer section to personalize the branding. Specifically, replace the existing text "Add us on social media?" with "Raj chavda".
What to Change
Target Text: Replace the string "Add us on social media?" with "Raj chavda".
Acceptance Criteria
[ ] The text "Add us on social media?" is successfully removed.
[ ] The text "Raj chavda" is correctly rendered in its place.
[ ] The update does not cause any layout distortion or text overflow in the footer or designated section.
[ ] The styling (font, size, alignment) of "Raj chavda" matches the original design requirements.
